content.name: Options Helper
content.author: Chem O`Dun
content.description:
A library mod for [b]X4: Foundations[/b] that provides reusable MD (Mission Director) script libraries for building [b]SirNukes Mod Support APIs[/b] options menus.
[h2][b]Requirements[/b][/h2] [list] [*] [b]X4: Foundations[/b] version 8.00 or newer [*] [b]SirNukes Mod Support APIs[/b] version 1.95 or higher [/list] [h2][b]Installation[/b][/h2]
Place the [b]options_helper/[/b] folder in your X4 extensions directory alongside your other mods.
[h2][b]API Reference[/b][/h2]
All libraries live in the [b]md.Options_Helper[/b] namespace. Widget-building libraries use [b]purpose="run_actions"[/b] (called with [b]<run_actions ref="...">[/b]) while layout and event-processing libraries use [b]purpose="include_actions"[/b] (called with [b]<include_actions ref="...">[/b]).
[h2]Layout libraries[/h2]
[h3][b][b]Add_Empty_Row[/b] — [b]include_actions[/b][/b][/h3]
Adds a thin visual separator row (border height) to the current options menu.
[h3][b][b]Add_Title_Row[/b] — [b]run_actions[/b][/b][/h3]
Adds a centred section title row followed by an empty separator row. [list] [*] [b]title[/b] [i](required)[/i] - Text string or text DB reference [b]{page, id}[/b] [*] [b]columns[/b] [i](default: [b]12[/b])[/i] - Number of columns in the menu [/list]
[h2]Widget libraries[/h2]
[h3][b][b]Add_Checkbox[/b] — [b]run_actions[/b][/b][/h3]
Adds a checkbox widget with a text label to its right. Automatically starts a new row when [b]col == 1[/b]. [list] [*] [b]id[/b] [i](required)[/i] - String identifier - used to build the widget id and the echo key [b]$<id>[/b] [*] [b]col[/b] [i](default: [b]1[/b])[/i] - Column for the checkbox widget [*] [b]textColSpan[/b] [i](default: [b]1[/b])[/i] - Column span for the label text cell [*] [b]text[/b] [i](default: [b]''[/b])[/i] - Label text or text DB reference [*] [b]data[/b] [i](required)[/i] - Table holding the current value at key [b]$<id>[/b] [*] [b]active[/b] [i](default: [b]true[/b])[/i] - Whether the widget is interactive [*] [b]handle[/b] [i](default: [b]null[/b])[/i] - Cue to signal on click [/list] [b]Handler echo fields:[/b] [list] [*] [b]event.param.$echo.$valueId[/b] - table key string, e.g. [b]'$mySetting'[/b] [*] [b]event.param.$checked[/b] - int [b]0[/b] or [b]1[/b] after the click [/list]
[h3][b][b]Add_Dropdown[/b] — [b]run_actions[/b][/b][/h3]
Adds a label text cell followed by a dropdown widget on the same row. Automatically starts a new row when [b]col == 1[/b]. [list] [*] [b]id[/b] [i](required)[/i] - String identifier - used to build the widget id and the echo key [b]$<id>[/b] [*] [b]options[/b] [i](required)[/i] - List of [b][$text = ..., $value = ...][/b] option entries [*] [b]currentIndex[/b] [i](default: [b]1[/b])[/i] - 1-based index of the initially selected option [*] [b]col[/b] [i](default: [b]1[/b])[/i] - Column for the label text cell [*] [b]textColSpan[/b] [i](default: [b]1[/b])[/i] - Column span for the label [*] [b]text[/b] [i](default: [b]''[/b])[/i] - Label text or text DB reference [*] [b]dropdownColSpan[/b] [i](default: [b]1[/b])[/i] - Column span for the dropdown widget [*] [b]active[/b] [i](default: [b]true[/b])[/i] - Whether the widget is interactive [*] [b]handle[/b] [i](default: [b]null[/b])[/i] - Cue to signal on option confirm [/list] [b]Handler echo fields:[/b] [list] [*] [b]event.param.$echo.$valueId[/b] - table key string, e.g. [b]'$myOption'[/b] [*] [b]event.param.$option.$value[/b] - value of the selected option [/list]
[h3][b][b]Add_Slider[/b] — [b]run_actions[/b][/b][/h3]
Adds a non-selectable label row followed by a slider widget row. Always creates a two-row pair. [list] [*] [b]id[/b] [i](required)[/i] - String identifier - used to build the widget id and the echo key [b]$<id>[/b] [*] [b]text[/b] [i](default: [b]''[/b])[/i] - Label text or text DB reference shown above the slider [*] [b]min[/b] [i](default: [b]0[/b])[/i] - Minimum slider value [*] [b]max[/b] [i](default: [b]100[/b])[/i] - Maximum slider value [*] [b]step[/b] [i](default: [b]1[/b])[/i] - Step increment between slider positions [*] [b]suffix[/b] [i](default: [b]''[/b])[/i] - String appended to the displayed current value [*] [b]colSpan[/b] [i](default: [b]1[/b])[/i] - Column span for both the label and slider cells [*] [b]data[/b] [i](required)[/i] - Table holding the current value at key [b]$<id>[/b] [*] [b]readOnly[/b] [i](default: [b]false[/b])[/i] - Whether the slider is display-only [*] [b]handle[/b] [i](default: [b]null[/b])[/i] - Cue to signal on slider confirm [/list] [b]Handler echo fields:[/b] [list] [*] [b]event.param.$echo.$valueId[/b] - table key string, e.g. [b]'$mySlider'[/b] [*] [b]event.param.$value[/b] - confirmed longfloat value [/list]
[h2]Event-processing libraries[/h2]
These three libraries are [b]include_actions[/b] — they run inline inside your handler cue, where [b]event.param[/b] is in scope. Before calling, assign [b]$resultTable[/b] to the table you want written.
[h3][b][b]Process_Dropdown_Changed[/b] — [b]include_actions[/b][/b][/h3]
Reads [b]event.param.$echo.$valueId[/b] and [b]event.param.$option.$value[/b], writes the selected value into [b]$resultTable[/b].
[h3][b][b]Process_Slider_Changed[/b] — [b]include_actions[/b][/b][/h3]
Reads [b]event.param.$echo.$valueId[/b] and [b]event.param.$value[/b], writes the confirmed slider value into [b]$resultTable[/b].
[h3][b][b]Process_Checkbox_Changed[/b] — [b]include_actions[/b][/b][/h3]
Reads [b]event.param.$echo.$valueId[/b] and [b]event.param.$checked[/b] (int [b]0[/b]/[b]1[/b]), writes the checked state into [b]$resultTable[/b].
[h2][b]Small Usage Example[/b][/h2]
[code] <!-- Register your menu on API reload --> <cue name="Register_Menu" instantiate="true"> <conditions> <event_cue_signalled cue="md.Simple_Menu_API.Reloaded" /> </conditions> <actions> <signal_cue_instantly cue="md.Simple_Menu_API.Register_Options_Menu" param="table[ $id = 'my_mod_options', $columns = 12, $title = 'My Mod Options', $onOpen = My_Menu_Open, ]" /> </actions> </cue>
<!-- Build menu content on open --> <cue name="My_Menu_Open" instantiate="true"> <conditions><event_cue_signalled /></conditions> <actions> <!-- load your settings table into $mySettings here -->
<include_actions ref="md.Options_Helper.Add_Empty_Row" /> <run_actions ref="md.Options_Helper.Add_Title_Row"> <param name="title" value="'General Settings'" /> </run_actions>
<run_actions ref="md.Options_Helper.Add_Checkbox"> <param name="id" value="'enabled'" /> <param name="col" value="1" /> <param name="textColSpan" value="11" /> <param name="text" value="'Enable feature'" /> <param name="data" value="@$mySettings" /> <param name="handle" value="Handle_Checkbox" /> </run_actions> </actions> </cue>
<!-- Handlers --> <cue name="Handle_Checkbox" instantiate="true"> <conditions><event_cue_signalled /></conditions> <actions> <set_value name="$resultTable" exact="@$mySettings" /> <include_actions ref="md.Options_Helper.Process_Checkbox_Changed" /> <remove_value name="$resultTable" /> <!-- persist $mySettings here --> </actions> </cue> [/code]
[h2][b]Credits[/b][/h2] [list] [*] [b]Author[/b]: Chem O`Dun, on [url=https://next.nexusmods.com/profile/ChemODun/mods?gameId=2659]Nexus Mods[/url] and [url=https://steamcommunity.com/id/chemodun/myworkshopfiles/?appid=392160]Steam Workshop[/url] [*] [i]"X4: Foundations"[/i] is a trademark of [url=https://www.egosoft.com]Egosoft[/url]. [/list] [h2][b]Acknowledgements[/b][/h2] [list] [*] [url=https://www.egosoft.com]EGOSOFT[/url] - for the X series. [*] [url=https://next.nexusmods.com/profile/sirnukes?gameId=2659]SirNukes[/url]
